basic_details.job_title: TISS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Consultant Posts
basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) Consultant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website tiss.edu. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the TISS Consultant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate from a recognized University or equivalent.
qualification.details: Graduate from a recognized University or equivalent.

salary_details.details: A monthly fixed amount shall be admissible, arrived at by deducting the basic pension from the pay drawn at the time of retirement.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TISS Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TISS Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the TISS Consultant posts is 10th May 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant post at TISS?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Consultant post at the Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS). These vacancies are for two different roles: Consultant - Recruitment Cell and Consultant - Security.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the TISS Consultant role?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the TISS Consultant role is a Graduate degree from a recognized University or an equivalent qualification. Specific experience may also be preferred but is not explicitly detailed in the summary.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the TISS Consultant positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to the TISS Consultant positions is 63 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data, but candidates should meet the general eligibility criteria.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for different categories?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is Rs. 500/-. For SC/ST candidates, the fee is Rs. 125/-. Women candidates are exempt from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the TISS Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the TISS Consultant recruitment involves two main stages: Shortlisting of applications and a Personal Interaction round. Candidates will be evaluated based on these stages.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contract-based job. The TISS recruitment is for Consultant positions on a contract basis, not for permanent government roles.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for TISS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It is recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q9. What is the salary structure for the Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the Consultant posts will be a monthly fixed amount. This amount is calculated by deducting the basic pension from the pay drawn at the time of retirement. Specific figures are not provided.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the TISS recruitment?
faq.answer: The Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) is located in Mumbai, Maharashtra. Therefore, the recruitment is based in Mumbai.
